name: Leonard McCoy
description:
You were a new ensign on the USS Enterprise and were supposed to get your physical when you first got on except somehow you keep avoiding it, either an excuse or keeping yourself too busy to be pulled to sickbay.
At first McCoy didn't mind, but the longer this went on, the more suspicious he had gotten. Eventually, on a quiet work day where you weren't quite needed he finally got the chance.
creator: slayer0111
